message:
test(surface): add 22 resize edge case tests for Surface render layer (wa-1u90p.7.1)

Tests cover: same-dimension noop, seqno behavior with buffered changes,
change stream invalidation, asymmetric grow/shrink (width-only, height-only),
cursor clamping (x, y, within-bounds), attribute preservation on grow,
scroll+resize interaction, grow/shrink oscillation, rapid resize sequences,
1x1 minimum, full repaint after resize, draw_from_screen interaction,
screen_cells/lines count correctness, title/visibility/shape preservation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
